title: Create rockets
description: Super powerful rockets that are both aesthetically pleasing and based of real rockets! Really good for gaining speed in Create aeronautics!
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2e939797771373868010f3279413a76e7b458c1.png)

An addon to an addon to a Minecraft mod. Oh the inception!
I am very proud to announce my biggest mod YET!

## What is this?
This mod adds two recreations of real life rockets into Minecraft!
This includes:
- The Saturn V's F1 engine
- The SpaceX raptor 3 engine

## Additional notes
I have spent SO MANY HOURS perfecting the physics and the way the particles look... I have aimed at getting the best looking particles for them and have learned a lot about NeoForge and the way minecraft rendering works!

Please take the time to enjoy and report issues against the mod!
